goal: submodule_subset[R, K](module_hom_image[R, M, K](h), module_hom_image[R, N, K](f)) = forall(x0: K) { module_hom_image[R, M, K](h).contains(x0) implies module_hom_image[R, N, K](f).contains(x0) }
proof: function[T0: AddCommGroup, T1: Ring](x0: Submodule[T1, T0], x1: Submodule[T1, T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = submodule_subset[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[K, R](module_hom_image[R, M, K](h), module_hom_image[R, N, K](f))

function[T0: AddCommGroup, T1: Ring](x0: Submodule[T1, T0], x1: Submodule[T1, T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = submodule_subset[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[K, R](module_hom_image[R, M, K](h), module_hom_image[R, N, K](f))
